description: Triggers when implementing SEO in Next.js — metadata API, robots.txt, sitemap, structured data, Open Graph, Core Web Vitals, or llms.txt for AI crawlers
should_trigger: Set up metadata, robots.txt and sitemap.ts for my Next.js 15 app
Implement Organization JSON-LD schema and Open Graph tags for my homepage
Create a llms.txt file to optimize my site for AI search engines
Configure robots.txt to allow GPTBot, ClaudeBot and PerplexityBot
Add hreflang alternates for my Italian/English/Czech multilingual Next.js site
What Core Web Vitals optimizations should I apply to improve LCP and CLS?
Generate a dynamic sitemap that includes blog posts and service pages
should_not_trigger: Audit my competitor's SEO and find ranking opportunities
Write keyword-optimized blog content for my SaaS
Set up Google Analytics 4 for conversion tracking
